message: I'm looking for a fair deal. I'd suggest we aim for trades around the low-to-mid range to ensure we both benefit consistently across rounds. What ask are you considering?
My cost is 59, so I will not accept offers below 59.
I'm flexible. How about 40?
If your cost is truly 59, we can't trade — my valuation is below that. I won't bid above my value and take a loss. We'll both get zero every round unless one of us was bluffing.
Nice trade at 40 last round — that works for both of us. Let's keep it simple and repeat: I'll bid 40 again if you ask 40. Consistent 5/round beats zero.
